campaign.title: Your Community Position
campaign.subject: I wanted to update you on [Category] availability in [Community Name]
campaign.description: AM status update on category availability — first conversion touchpoint

landing_page.ai_goal: Present the opportunity and offer the proposal

slides.title: Your Community Status

content.headline: [Category] in [Community Name]
content.subhead: Status update from your account manager

slides.narration: Hi, this is your account manager. I want to update you on the situation in your community and your category. Here's where things stand right now.

slides.title: Community Scorecard
slides.narration: Here's your community scorecard. Out of 37 total positions, this many are filled. In your category, this many of the available slots are taken. And if you're interested in Founder pricing — locked at three hundred dollars a month for three years — you have this many days left in that window.

slides.title: What You've Done So Far
slides.narration: Here's what you've done so far in the network. Your listing is live. You've had views. You've posted events and content. You're connected. The Community Influencer membership takes all of this and amplifies it with premium placement, news coverage, and priority across everything.

slides.title: Community Influencer Membership

elements.label: News Coverage
elements.desc: 15-20 mentions per month in community news

elements.label: Category Lock
elements.desc: Your slot — competitors can't take it

slides.narration: The Community Influencer membership gives you premium placement across the entire network, news coverage with fifteen to twenty mentions per month, featured events, coupons, ads, a professional web presence, and — this is important — your category slot is locked. Once you have it, your competitors can't take it.

slides.title: Pricing

content.headline: $300/month
content.note: Founder pricing: $300/month locked for 3 years if signed within the launch window.

slides.narration: The membership is three hundred dollars a month with a twelve-month commitment. At the end of your first year, you get three bonus months free — months thirteen through fifteen. That brings your effective rate to two-forty a month. And if you sign during the Founder window, three hundred is locked for three years.

slides.title: Your Proposal

content.headline: Your Proposal Is Ready
content.body: I've put together a proposal for your business. Review it and let me know what questions you have.

slides.narration: I've put together a proposal specifically for your business. You can review it right now, or schedule a call with me to walk through it. I want to be upfront about timing — your category has limited slots remaining and they're first-come, first-served. I can't hold them.

slides.title: Your Account Manager

content.headline: [AM Name] — Your Account Manager
content.body: I've been watching your category in [Community Name]. I want to make sure you have the best position available.
content.slot_status: Other [Category] businesses have been inquiring. Just keeping you informed.

slides.narration: I'm your account manager and I've been monitoring your category in your community. Other businesses have been inquiring. I'm not trying to rush you — I'm trying to make sure you have the information you need to decide. Call me, email me, or click through to your proposal anytime.

email_briefing.subject: I wanted to update you on [Category] availability in [Community Name]
email_briefing.preview_text: Your account manager with a status update
email_briefing.body:
Hi [First Name],

This is [AM Name], your account manager at [Community Name] Day.News.

I've been looking at the [Category] positions in [Community Name] and I want to make sure you're aware of the current situation.

Here's where things stand:

→ [Community Name] has 37 total business positions across all categories
→ [X] positions are filled
→ [Category] has [Y] slots. [Z] are taken. [W] remain.
→ Founder pricing ($300/month locked for 3 years) is available for [D] more days

You've been using our free tools — your listing, events, announcements. The Community Influencer membership gives you premium placement, news coverage, and priority across everything.

I put together a proposal for your business. You can review it here:

[SEE YOUR PROPOSAL →]

Or if you want a walkthrough of what the membership includes:

[SEE WHAT'S INCLUDED →]

I'll follow up in a few days. In the meantime, I want to flag that I've had inquiries from other [Category] businesses in [Community Name]. I'm not trying to rush you — just keeping you informed.

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
[phone] | [email]
